COMMON.NO_PERMISSION: You do not have permission to perform this action

AUTH.REGISTER_SUCCESS: Registration successful. Please check your email for OTP verification.
AUTH.ROLE_UPDATED: User role updated successfully from '{{oldRole}}' to '{{newRole}}'
AUTH.EMAIL_VERIFIED: Email verified successfully. You can now login.
AUTH.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account temporarily locked due to failed login attempts
AUTH.LOGOUT_ALL_SUCCESS: Logged out from all devices successfully
AUTH.RESET_EMAIL_SENT: If email is registered, you will receive a message
AUTH.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters
AUTH.GOOGLE_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Google account email is not verified
AUTH.GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_LINKED: Google account linked to your existing account

PROPERTY.NOT_OWNER: You do not have permission — not the owner of this property
PROPERTY.NOT_AVAILABLE: Property is not available for booking right now
PROPERTY.FOR_SALE_ONLY: This property is for sale, not for rent

BOOKING.START_NOT_PAST: Start date cannot be in the past
BOOKING.DATE_CONFLICT: The property is booked during this time range
BOOKING.ALREADY_PROCESSED: Booking is already cancelled or rejected

PAYMENT.INVALID_METHOD: Invalid payment method. Must be one of: {{methods}}
PAYMENT.DOUBLE_PAYMENT: Payment already initiated for this booking. Status: {{status}}. Cannot create another payment until this one is resolved.

AUCTION.FIELDS_REQUIRED: property, startingPrice, startDate, endDate are required
AUCTION.START_IN_FUTURE: startDate must be in the future
AUCTION.NO_PERMISSION_CREATE: You do not have permission to create an auction for this property
AUCTION.ALREADY_ACTIVE: This property already has an active auction
AUCTION.CREATED: Auction created successfully - awaiting admin approval
AUCTION.NO_PERMISSION_EDIT: You do not have permission to edit this auction
AUCTION.CANNOT_EDIT_STARTED: Cannot edit auction after it has started
AUCTION.NO_PERMISSION_DELETE: You do not have permission to delete this auction
AUCTION.CANNOT_DELETE_ACTIVE: Cannot delete an active auction with bids
AUCTION.CANCELLED_NO_CLOSE: Auction is cancelled and cannot be closed
AUCTION.CLOSED_WITH_WINNER: Auction closed — Winner: {{winner}} with a bid of {{amount}}

BID.AMOUNT_POSITIVE: Bid amount must be a positive number
BID.AUCTION_NOT_ACTIVE: Auction is not active or has ended
BID.ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: Your account is suspended and you cannot bid
BID.MINIMUM_BID: Bid amount must be at least {{minimum}} (current: {{current}}, increment: {{increment}})
BID.OWN_AUCTION: You cannot bid on your own auction

REVIEW.OWN_PROPERTY: You cannot rate your own property
REVIEW.MUST_COMPLETE_BOOKING: You must complete a booking for this property before you can rate it
REVIEW.ALREADY_RATED: You have already rated this property

INQUIRY.OWN_PROPERTY: You cannot send an inquiry about your own property

VIEWING.OWN_PROPERTY: You cannot request a viewing for your own property
VIEWING.DUPLICATE: You already have a pending viewing request for this property
VIEWING.STATUS_INVALID: Status must be approved or rejected
VIEWING.CANNOT_CANCEL_PROCESSED: Cannot cancel a request that has been processed

KYC.INVALID_DOC_TYPE: Invalid document type. Must be one of: {{types}}
KYC.SUBMITTED: KYC documents submitted successfully! Awaiting admin review.
KYC.REQUIRED: KYC verification required to perform this action
KYC.KYC_HELP: Please complete your KYC verification first. Visit /kyc to upload documents.
KYC.REJECTION_REASON_MAX: Rejection reason must not exceed 500 characters
KYC.RESET: KYC has been reset. User can submit documents again.

REPORT.ALREADY_REPORTED: You have already reported this content
REPORT.SUBMITTED: Report submitted successfully and will be reviewed soon

UPLOAD.CLOUDINARY_FAILED: Failed to upload image to Cloudinary

ERRORS.PASSWORD_CHANGED_LOGIN: Password was recently changed, please log in again
ERRORS.SESSION_INVALID: Session is no longer valid, please log in again

VALIDATION.NAME_LENGTH: Name must be between 3 and 50 characters
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 8 characters
VALIDATION.NEW_PASSWORD_MIN: New password must be at least 8 characters
VALIDATION.NEW_PASSWORD_SAME: New password must be different from current password
VALIDATION.ROLE_INVALID: Role must be: buyer, owner, or agent
VALIDATION.TITLE_LENGTH: Title must be between 10 and 100 characters
VALIDATION.LISTING_TYPE_INVALID: Listing type must be sale or rent
VALIDATION.BEDROOMS_MIN: Number of bedrooms cannot be negative
VALIDATION.BATHROOMS_MIN: Number of bathrooms cannot be negative
VALIDATION.START_DATE_PAST: Start date cannot be in the past
VALIDATION.END_DATE_AFTER_START: End date must be after start date
VALIDATION.MESSAGE_LENGTH: Message must be between 5 and 1000 characters
VALIDATION.STARTING_PRICE_MIN: Starting price must be greater than 0
VALIDATION.BID_INCREMENT_MIN: Minimum bid increment must be greater than 0
VALIDATION.BID_AMOUNT_MIN: Bid amount must be greater than 0
VALIDATION.TITLE_MAX: Property title must not exceed 100 characters
VALIDATION.PROPERTY_OWNER_REQUIRED: Property must belong to a user

NOTIFICATION.BOOKING_APPROVED_MSG: Your booking for property "{{property}}" has been approved
NOTIFICATION.BOOKING_REJECTED_MSG: Unfortunately your booking was rejected, you can search for other properties
NOTIFICATION.AUCTION_WON_MSG: You won the auction for "{{property}}" with a bid of {{amount}}
NOTIFICATION.AUCTION_APPROVED_MSG: Your auction for "{{property}}" has been approved and will start on schedule
NOTIFICATION.NEW_INQUIRY_MSG: {{name}} sent an inquiry about your property "{{property}}"
NOTIFICATION.INQUIRY_REPLY_MSG: You received a reply to your inquiry
NOTIFICATION.VIEWING_APPROVED_MSG: Your viewing request for "{{property}}" has been approved
NOTIFICATION.VIEWING_REJECTED_MSG: Your viewing request for "{{property}}" has been rejected
